history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 2, column B, facing right. The cell in front is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. The goal is at row 4, column D. I need to navigate around the lava. I will turn clockwise to face down, then move forward to row 3, column B.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D. I can move forward to (03,B) which is safe floor. Then I will need to turn right to go east towards the goal. So my next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D (`O`). To reach it, I need to move right first to column D, then down. The cell directly in front (04 B) is safe floor, but that would lead me to a dead end because (04 C) is lava. Instead, I should turn counter-clockwise to face right, then move to (03 C), then (03 D), then turn clockwise to face down, then move to goal. So first action: turn counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell directly ahead (row 03 column C) is floor (safe). I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>FRENTE</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column C, facing right. The cell directly in front (3,D) is empty. The goal is at (4,D). To reach it, I need to move forward to (3,D) first, then turn clockwise to face down, and then move forward to the goal. The first step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column D, facing right. The goal is directly below at row 4, column D. To face down, I need to perform a clockwise rotation.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D, facing down. The goal is directly below me at row 04 column D, which is a safe cell (O). I can move forward one step to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
